data.value: Rounding Time must between From and To

data.value: This timetable has been used,are you sure to delete it?

data.value: The department is being used and cannot be deleted.

data.value: This employee is not exist yet!

data.value: Password length should not be less than 4!

data.value: There are employees in this area and cannot be deleted

data.value: Timetable's count should less then 3 in a day.

data.value: Timetable should not have repeat of time.

data.value: Server address is invalid,please input again.
